feature: SDKConnect voice-video facade split with CallEngine SSOT callType propagation and accept mismatch guards
constraints_preserved: JWT expiry enforced before media connect
Invalid signals emit error events (no silent drops)
Facade split preserves a single CallEngine authority
Accept flows fail fast on callType mismatches
verified_facts: SDKConnect now separates public voice/video facade concerns while keeping CallEngine as the single source of truth
Facade entrypoints propagate explicit callType into CallEngine for lifecycle and media decisions
acceptCall guards reject mismatched callType before connection side effects
Previously preserved video, JWT expiry, and signal rejection protections remain intact
